activities.title: Business Tool Comparison Map
instructions: Map how restaurants, doctors, mechanics, and advisors diagnose problems
Add one venture from your squad's experience

activities.title: FNA Diagnostic Dyads
instructions: 8 min discovery / 4 min feedback / swap roles
Use Week 1 persona or Week 2 validated segment

activities.title: Needs Theme Synthesis
instructions: Squads cluster discovered needs into themes
Link each theme to opportunity from Day 11
